overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city. The player walks past commercial kiosks and vending machines, approaches a railing where NPCs are taking photos of the view, and observes a boat in the water and Johnny Silverhand sitting on the railing.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete promenade past food vendors and benches

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with glass facade and orange structural elements
large curved orange metal framework structure attached to the tower
small commercial booth with purple panels and green roof trim
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
rectangular concrete seating planters with greenery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy, overcast waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward past a purple food kiosk on the left and modern glass towers on the right. The wet concrete reflects the gray sky, and the area is devoid of crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront viewing area with parked vehicle

events.description: exiting the commercial kiosk area and entering the open waterfront viewing zone with visible water and skyline

agents.ego_description: walking past a blue vending machine and approaching a black van parked near the railing

notable_agents.action: black van parked along the waterfront railing with rear doors visible

entered.detail: bright blue automated vending kiosk with anime-style advertisement
large black utility van parked parallel to the railing
metal safety railing separating the walkway from the water
distant city buildings and bridge visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the food kiosk area into a more open waterfront zone. A blue vending machine appears on the left, followed by a black van parked near the railing. The water and distant city skyline become visible as the commercial structures recede behind.

events.description: slowing down to observe the crowd taking photos at the railing
camera looks down over the railing to reveal a boat deck below with equipment

agents.ego_description: moving through a group of NPCs taking photos of the waterfront view and looking down at the boat

notable_agents.action: woman in teal dress taking a selfie with her phone near the binoculars
woman with blue hair taking a photo with a camera

entered.detail: coin-operated binocular viewer mounted on a metal pedestal
small boat with white canopy docked below the railing, visible deck with equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a gathering of NPCs at the waterfront railing who are taking photos of the view. Viewing binoculars are positioned along the railing. The camera pans down to reveal a small boat docked below, then continues along the railing where more people are observing the water.

events.description: camera turns to focus on Johnny Silverhand sitting on the railing

agents.ego_description: approaching Johnny Silverhand who is sitting on the railing looking out at the water

notable_agents.action: Johnny Silverhand sitting on the railing with his cybernetic arm visible, looking out at the water

entered.detail: character with black hair, wearing a vest and brown pants, with distinctive red and white cybernetic arm

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches Johnny Silverhand sitting on the waterfront railing, revealing his cybernetic arm as he gazes at the water. The camera then pans back toward the promenade, showing the modern tower and orange arch structure in the background as the scene concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rainy futuristic promenade that transitions from a narrow commercial corridor to an open waterfront vista. It begins by gliding past a purple food kiosk and towering glass structures, where the wet concrete reflects a heavy, overcast sky. As the camera moves forward, the commercial buildings recede to reveal a blue vending machine and a parked black van, opening the view toward the distant city skyline and the water. The scene then shifts through a crowd of NPCs taking photos at the railing, panning down to a small docked boat before continuing along the edge. Finally, the camera approaches Johnny Silverhand as he sits on the railing with his cybernetic arm visible, before panning back to capture the modern towers and a prominent orange arch in the background.
